heading: Tonight
text: Rain,with the chance of flurries in the St. Lawrence Valley and northern NY late. Lows from the low to mid 30s, with some 40s in the Connecticut River Valley. South wind 10 to 15 mph, occasionally gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Thursday
text: Mostly cloudy. Any morning rain or snow showers becoming more scattered. Temperatures falling into the 30s in the afternoon. Wind turning west at 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Gradual clearing west to east, clouds lingering through the northern mountains. Much colder. Lows in the teens to near 20 north, low to mid 20s south. Northwest wind near 10 mph, diminishing to light.
